reason: Duplicate of DT044 physics: E=9e5 V/m, r=0.4 m, eps_r=2.5 gives |q|≈4.0e-5 C and sign negative; expected -0.4e-6 C is off by 100x.
MA=1 cm, MB=3 cm, AB=2 cm implies collinear with A between M and B; net field is about 3.2e5 N/C, not 4.0e4 N/C.
Coulomb force vector sum using CA=10 cm, CB=8 cm, AB=9 cm gives about 1.48e-3 N; expected 1.480 N is off by 1000x.
Three equal charges 5e-6 C on equilateral triangle side 10 cm give sqrt(3) k q^2/a^2 ≈ 38.9 N; expected 3.89e-3 N is off by 1e4.
Symmetric dipole geometry with q_test=1e-8 C gives net force about 0.230 N; expected 0.230e-3 N is off by 1000x.
At the right-angle vertex of an isosceles right triangle, equal perpendicular fields combine by sqrt(2), giving about 5.64e6 V/m; expected 7.95e6 equals scalar 2E, not vector sum.
